duplicate_image.title: Duplicate Image Detected
duplicate_image.description:
⚠️ {member.mention}, one of your images looks like a repost.

No points were awarded for this submission.

Please share a new, original success image to earn points!

role_removed_dm.title: Membership Status Changed
role_removed_dm.description:
⚠️ Your membership status has changed.

If your membership ends, you'll lose your success points.

Please contact staff if you believe this is an error.
role_removed_dm.footer: Points reset when membership role is removed

help_member.title: Success Points System - Help
help_member.description:
Welcome to the Success Points system! Here's how it works:

**📊 How to Earn Points:**
• Post images of your successes in designated success channels
• Each unique success image earns **1 point**
• Duplicate images are automatically detected (no points)

**💾 Where Points Are Stored:**
• All points are stored securely in JSON format
• Points are tied to your Discord user ID
• Data is persistent and backed up

**🎯 How to Check Your Points:**
• Use `/rspoints` command to see your current total
• Use `/rsleaderboard` to see top 10 members
• Use `/rsredeeminfo` to learn about redemption options

**🏆 Leaderboard:**
• Top 10 members by points are displayed
• Updated in real-time as points are awarded
• Compete with other members!

**⚠️ Important Notes:**
• Points reset to 0 if you lose your membership role
• Only original, unique success images count
• Points are non-transferable
help_member.footer: Use slash commands for member features

help_admin.title: Admin Commands - Success Points Bot
help_admin.description:
**Admin Commands (use `!` prefix):**

• `!checkpoints <member>` - Check points for a specific user
• `!addpoints <member> <amount>` - Add points to a member
• `!removepoints <member> <amount>` - Remove points from a member
• `!setpoints <member> <amount>` - Set exact points for a member
• `!status` - Show bot status and statistics
• `!reload` - Reload config and messages from files
• `!configinfo` - Display current configuration

**Required Permission:** `manage_messages`

redeem_info.title: Redeeming Your Success Points
redeem_info.description:
**How to Redeem Points:**

Currently, success points are used for:
• 🏆 **Leaderboard Rankings** - Compete for the top spots!
• 📊 **Tracking Your Success** - See your progress over time
• 🎯 **Community Recognition** - Show off your achievements

**Future Redemption Options:**
• More redemption options may be added in the future
• Check back regularly for updates
• Contact staff with suggestions!

**Current Points:** {current_points}

Keep sharing your successes to earn more points!
redeem_info.footer: Points system powered by Success Bot

points_display.footer: Keep sharing successes to earn more points!
